message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): expand MVCC layer with cache-aligned atomics, SHM protocol, and invariants

Substantial expansion of the MVCC concurrency control crate:

- core_types.rs: add ~1790 lines implementing the full MVCC snapshot
  isolation type system — read/write transaction handles, snapshot
  descriptors, version chain nodes, conflict detection, and the
  multi-version page table
- cache_aligned.rs: add cache-line-aligned atomic wrappers to prevent
  false sharing on the hot-path SHM coordination counters
- shm.rs: expand shared-memory region protocol with read/write mark
  arrays, WAL index hash tables, and checkpoint coordination state
  matching the SQLite WAL-index format
- invariants.rs: add debug-mode invariant assertions for MVCC safety
  properties (snapshot ordering, write-set disjointness, WAL frame
  monotonicity)
- lib.rs: wire up new modules and update public re-exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
